metadata.title: Enrique Becerra — Web development for freelancers and SMBs
metadata.description: Custom websites for clinics, law firms, freelancers and SMBs. No templates, no fluff. Fast, accessible and built so your team can run them solo.
metadata.ogDescription: Custom websites for clinics, law firms, freelancers and SMBs. No generic templates, no agencies. Fast, accessible and easy to maintain.
metadata.twitterDescription: Custom websites for clinics, law firms and small businesses. No templates, no fluff.

hero.title: I build [circle]tailored[/circle] websites to bring customers to your business.
hero.lead: You talk to me, not a salesperson. No generic templates, no agencies selling hot air. I deliver something that works and that you can maintain.

services.title: How I can help you
services.lead: Four ways to work together, with clear pricing from the first contact. Not sure which fits your case? Write me and I'll point you the right way — no strings attached.
services.auditBody: Not sure which one fits your case, or want a second opinion on your current site? A 30-min conversation and a short written take by email. No sales pitch.

cases.title: Real projects, solved problems
cases.lead: Three solution patterns I've brought from enterprise environments to businesses of any scale. End clients remain under confidentiality; I can share specific references after a first conversation.

case.placeholderBody: The clients I work with do so under contract and I can't show them publicly here. I'm happy to share specific references on your preferred channel after a first conversation.

about.title: Hi, I'm Enrique Becerra
about.bio1: I'm Enrique Becerra. For 8+ years I've built corporate websites, government portals and intranets for organizations that can't afford their web to fail.
about.bio2: I now bring that same rigor to freelancers and SMBs: websites your team can maintain on their own, that integrate with the tools you already use, and that keep working as you grow. The difference is size, not how we work.

process.title: From idea to live site in 4 steps
process.lead: No endless consulting, no invoice surprises. A short, honest and measurable path from first call to the point where your team runs the site on its own.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.lead: Tell me what you need and I'll reply within 24 business hours with a first take on scope.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell me briefly what you need
contact.formSuccess: Message sent. I'll reply within 24 business hours.
contact.formError: Failed to send. Try emailing me at contacto@ebecerra.es instead.

capabilities.title: Technology that gives you an edge
capabilities.lead: Your website can do much more than just be online. Let's talk about what really moves the needle: serving better, saving time, deciding with data.
capabilities.aiDesc: A 24/7 chatbot trained on your information. Answers FAQs, books appointments, captures leads and sends them to your inbox or CRM.
capabilities.aiB1: Replies in your tone, in multiple languages
capabilities.aiB2: AI assistant in the panel to draft and translate
capabilities.aiB3: Automatic summaries of reviews and feedback
capabilities.bookingDesc: Built-in calendar or integration with Doctoralia, Cal.com, Calendly or whatever you already use. Clients book without calling.
capabilities.bookB3: Online payments if you need them
capabilities.intDesc: Your website talking to the tools you already use. No more juggling five tabs to get one thing done.
capabilities.intB2: Payment gateways, Google Maps, social media
capabilities.anDesc: Private analytics (without Google if you prefer). See which pages work, where clients come from, and what to change.
capabilities.noteText: These capabilities are optional and modular. You don't need them all: we start with what you need today and grow when your business asks for it.

examples.metaDescription: Browsable demos of professional websites for freelancers, SMBs and small businesses. See what you can have before commissioning yours.
examples.title: Real website examples for your business
examples.lead: Complete demos so you can see what you can have: marketing agency, coaching, physiotherapy clinic… Each one with its own personality and tone. Yours starts from a conversation with you, not from a template.
examples.homeLead: Browsable, complete demos of websites like the ones I deliver to freelancers, small businesses and personal projects. So you see the result before commissioning.
examples.emptyState: Demos coming soon. Check back later.

footer.tagline: Custom websites for businesses that won't settle for a template. Fast, accessible, easy to maintain and built so your team can run them without depending on anyone.

faq.metaDescription: Timelines, payment terms, design revisions, maintenance, Kit Digital, NDAs and hosting. The questions freelancers and SMBs ask me before starting a web project.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: What people usually ask before we start. If your question isn't here, drop me a line and I reply within 24 business hours.
faq.contactLead: Tell me your case and I'll give you a first idea of scope, no strings attached.
